calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court, Summary Of The Case As Required By Crc 388(A)(1) And Code Of Civil Procedure 585 For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Maxim Edward Shishlyannikov
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default judgment prove-up hearing as to Defendant Maxim Edward Shishlyannikov.

Dept. 505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by Certified Court Reporter, Tatianna Hammer, CSR#13769; (760)523-6838; tatianacsr@yahoo.com.(D505)

Lawrence C Ecoff, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff EVN Investments, LLC. Via Zoom video Conference.
Defendant Maxim Edward Shishlyannikov not appearing.
Vladimir Essev, CEO and witness for the plaintiff was placed under oath. Witness is being assisted by Russian Speaking Interpreter Mikhail Bogomolny; Certification #313218. Both via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Fiduciary Duty and Fraud filed April 20, 2021.
Amended Order of Publication of Summons filed on February 7, 2022.
Proof of publication as to Defendant Maxim Edward Shishlyannikov filed on March 7, 2022.
Dismissal filed as to Defendants Orbis Lending Fund IV, L.P. ( etc) and Does 1 through 50 on April 13, 2022.
Default entered as to Defendant Maxim Edward Shishlyannikov on April 13, 2022.

Plaintiff's counsel to summarize the issues of the case.
The Court briefly examines Counsel.
Counsel resumes summary of the case.
The Court confirms with the witness that Counsel's statements and the declarations made are true and correct.
The matter is submitted.

The Court rules in favor of Plaintiff EVN Investments, LLC and against Defendant Maxim Edward Shishlyannikov

Proposed Judgment to be submitted to the Court for review and approval.
